queries.question: Show the number of credits that students from each college and university completed and did not fail for the year 2021
queries.sql:
SELECT college, university, SUM(C.credits) as Num_Credits
FROM Students S
LEFT JOIN CourseEnrollments E ON S.id = E.student_id
LEFT JOIN Courses C ON C.id = E.course_id
WHERE E.year = 2021
AND E.grade not like '%F%'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
SELECT ?col ?uni (SUM(?cr) AS ?n) WHERE { ?s a :Students ; p:college ?col ; p:university ?uni . ?e a :Enrollments ; p:hasStudents ?s ; p:year ?y ; p:grade ?g ; p:hasCourses ?c . ?c p:credits ?cr . FILTER(STR(?y)="2021") FILTER(!REGEX(STR(?g),"F")) } GROUP BY ?col ?uni
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): omits GROUP BY; NL = total credits per college,university (year 2021, passing gr

queries.question: How many students from each college and university are enrolled in Calculus I?
queries.sql:
SELECT college, university, COUNT(student_id) AS Num_Students
FROM Students S
LEFT JOIN CourseEnrollments E ON S.id = E.student_id
LEFT JOIN Courses C ON C.id = E.course_id AND title = 'Calculus I'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
SELECT ?col ?uni (COUNT(?sid) AS ?n) WHERE { ?s a :Students ; p:college ?col ; p:university ?uni . ?e a :Enrollments ; p:hasStudents ?s ; p:student_id ?sid } GROUP BY ?col ?uni
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): omits GROUP BY; NL = #enrollments per college,university (Calculus filter in ON

queries.question: Find how many students from each offering department are enrolled in Calculus I.
queries.sql:
SELECT university, COUNT(student_id) AS Num_Students
FROM Students S
LEFT JOIN CourseEnrollments E ON S.id = E.student_id
LEFT JOIN Courses C ON C.id = E.course_id AND title = 'Calculus I'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
SELECT ?uni (COUNT(?sid) AS ?n) WHERE { ?s a :Students ; p:university ?uni . ?e a :Enrollments ; p:hasStudents ?s ; p:student_id ?sid } GROUP BY ?uni
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): omits GROUP BY; NL = #enrollments per university
